description_long: This is a large, multi-story suburban house with a complex, gabled roof structure and a mix of wood and stone exterior finishes. The front facade features a covered porch supported by columns, multiple dormer windows, and a prominent entryway. The house includes a two-car garage with white doors, and the driveway leads up to it from the side. The rear of the house has a walk-out basement, a covered balcony, and large windows that provide ample natural light. The property is set on a rectangular plot of green lawn, with landscaping that is simple and open. Architectural details such as exposed beams, stone chimney, and decorative trim add to the Craftsman-inspired aesthetic.
description: A spacious, Craftsman-style house with a gabled roof, covered porch, dormer windows, and a two-car garage, set on a green lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, covered porch with columns, and the central gabled roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the two-car garage with dormer windows above and the driveway.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the walk-out basement, covered balcony, and large windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the back porch and the extended roofline over the balcony.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with dormers and large rear windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with columns, central door, steps, and decorative trim
